name: Elena Rostova
bio: Born in 1985, Elena Rostova has quickly become one of the most sought-after contemporary painters of her generation. Her ethereal abstractions explore the boundaries between light and shadow.

name: Marcus Vance
bio: A digital pioneer and mixed-media sculptor, Marcus Vance merges traditional carving techniques with generative algorithms to create breathtaking physical-digital hybrid works.

name: Sophia Lin
bio: Renowned for her large-scale hyper-realistic photography, Sophia Lin captures the fleeting moments of urban solitude and brutalist architecture.
